summary: Iteration 2 testing complete. Fixed karate assertion generation bug in backend. All 18 backend tests pass (100%). All frontend UI tests pass including new assertion authoring system, inspector collapse, step deletion, and download functionality.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 2 complete. All features working: (1) Extension fixes verified via file grep: [hidden] CSS in popup.css/dashboard.css, downloads permission in manifest.json. (2) Backend: assertion generation working for all 4 frameworks (playwright toBeVisible/toContainText, cypress should('be.visible'), selenium assert in driver.current_url, karate match text contains). Fixed missing _assert_lines call for karate framework. (3) Frontend: 3-tab inspector (Selectors/Assertions/Properties), AddAssertionModal with 6 assertion types, add/remove assertions updates code editor, inspector collapse toggle, step deletion with confirm dialog, add-assertion from timeline hover, download triggers browser download with correct filename pattern. (4) Regression: Landing page hero/buttons/table, Popup record/stop/framework, Settings modal with localStorage persistence all working.

backend: POST /api/generate-script with NO apiKey uses Emergent key, returns Claude model ✓
POST /api/generate-script selenium assertions=[urlContains] produces assert in driver.current_url ✓
POST /api/generate-script karate assertions=[containsText] produces match text contains ✓
frontend: Clicking Assertions tab switches inspector panel ✓
Save assertion adds assertion-item-0 with VISIBLE label ✓
Remove assertion removes from list and code ✓
Toggle inspector button hides/shows inspector column ✓
Step deletion with confirm dialog reduces step count ✓
Add assertion from timeline hover opens modal ✓

bugs_fixed_by_testing_agent.issue: Karate framework fallback generator missing _assert_lines call
bugs_fixed_by_testing_agent.fix: Added lines.extend(_assert_lines('karate', sel, strategy, s.get('assertions', []))) to karate section

extension_fixes_verified.fix_a_hidden_css: Verified: [hidden] { display: none !important; } present in /app/extension/popup.css and /app/extension/dashboard.css
